title: Wasp Removal in Somers, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional wasp removal services in Somers, Westchester. Safe nest elimination $350-$550. Licensed experts serving residential & commercial properties. Call today!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert wasp removal services throughout Somers, NY, protecting homes and businesses from aggressive stinging insects. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate wasp nests from properties throughout this scenic Westchester community. With transparent pricing from $350 to $550, we deliver fast, effective wasp control solutions tailored to Somers residents.
whyUs: Our team has extensive experience handling wasp infestations in Somers' diverse properties, from historic homes to modern developments near Lake Lincolndale. We use proven, eco-friendly methods that ensure complete nest removal while prioritizing the safety of your family, pets, and property.
localContext: Somers' wooded landscapes, proximity to Lasdon Park and Arboretum, and abundance of older homes create ideal conditions for wasp colonies, especially during warm months. Properties near Reis Park and along Route 202 frequently experience wasp activity in attics, eaves, and tree lines, requiring professional intervention.

faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal in Somers typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide upfront pricing after a thorough inspection of your property and never charge hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to wasp problems in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for wasp removal throughout Somers and surrounding Westchester areas. Our team understands the urgency of stinging insect issues and prioritizes rapid response to keep your property safe.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Somers?
faqs.answer: Somers properties commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. These species build nests in trees, under eaves, in attics, and within wall voids, becoming increasingly aggressive when defending their colonies.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our wasp removal process is completely safe for families and pets. We use targeted treatments and professional-grade equipment to eliminate nests while minimizing exposure to anyone on your property. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols throughout the removal process.
